metadata.description: CARTO skills catalog — utility + platform tiers. Three-tier layered skills for managing CARTO Geospatial Cloud resources, modeled on the MotherDuck agent-skills pattern.

plugins.name: carto-skills
plugins.description: CARTO skills bundle: utility tier (basics, connect/query/explore datawarehouse) + platform tier (import-export, workflows, find-spatial-data, manage-platform).
